ideas.headline: First product to ship: small surface, GS-level single decision-maker, fits απευθείας ανάθεση tier, no AI Act high-risk classification.
blockers: Need to quantify the gap vs. current Νομικό Συμβούλιο Strasbourg desk to defuse the 'duplicate-of-existing-function' objection in the first pitch.
Precedent set (i.AI Consult, Belastingdienst triage) is adjacent rather than exact ECHR-routing — must front-load the proof-of-concept rather than lean on intl precedent.
ideas.next30days: Run an FOI / public-data exercise to compute median 'Strasbourg decision → Greek directorate memo' lag for the last 24 months, then book an exploratory meeting with the Νομικό Συμβούλιο through T-Life's administrative-law network.

ideas.headline: Highest-ceiling idea but pilot procurability is the choke point; conditional on either landing a ΣτΕ-direct innovation pilot or stacking RRF e-justice funding.
blockers: Albert's flagship France Services deployment was publicly walked back in Jan 2026 — the marquee EU sovereign-LLM precedent is partially collapsed and must be re-framed (Albert API persists; the chatbot did not).
€250-450k pilot is structurally above απευθείας ανάθεση; needs an RRF e-justice envelope or innovation-pilot carve-out with ΣτΕ-direct commissioning.

EU AI Act Annex III compliance is now deferred to Dec 2027 (May 2026 Digital Omnibus deal), which buys design runway — but rapporteur copilot still falls inside high-risk classification once enforced.
Warm-intro path to ΣτΕ President is plausible but not currently in hand; needs a retired-πάρεδρος bridge before any pitch.
ideas.next30days: Identify and secure one retired ΣτΕ πάρεδρος as paid founding advisor — without that bridge, neither the warm intro nor the credibility hold.

ideas.headline: Best run as Product 2 inside the rapporteur-copilot company — shared corpus, but standalone the dual-buyer GTM is too thin for an early-stage studio bet.
blockers: Sakkoulas/Nomos lobby is the dominant constituency in Greek legal publishing and will respond to a head-on positioning — must lead with the 'sovereign internal index' framing, not 'database replacement'.
Dual buyer (ministry + private bar) doubles GTM; should not be the studio's first solo bet from this ministry.
Independent founder hire only justified if rapporteur-copilot pilot also commits.
ideas.next30days: Pause as a standalone bet; gate this to the rapporteur-copilot commitment. Within 30 days, validate corpus availability and dedup feasibility with one ΣτΕ jurisprudence expert as a paid feasibility study (<€10k).

ideas.headline: Re-scope to low-resource source languages (Albanian/Arabic/Urdu→Greek legal) as a Justice+Migration cross-ministry product; founder bench is the blocker, not the thesis.
blockers: Low-resource-MT specialist for Albanian/Arabic/Urdu→Greek legal register does not exist in Athens today; founder hire would need to be international relocation or extended remote.
Ορκωτός-μεταφραστής regulated certification caps value capture — model output is unusable in court without sworn sign-off; margin sits with the human, not the agent.
Multinational MT (DeepL, Google) is improving fast on the high-volume pairs; the moat collapses unless scoped narrowly.
ideas.next30days: Run a one-day re-scoping workshop: validate whether the low-resource subset (Albanian/Arabic/Urdu/Pashto) is large enough as a standalone wedge, or whether this only makes sense as a feature of the migration-asylum portfolio.

ideas.headline: Hostile second pass confirms the original kill: speculative champion, weak intl precedent on web search, OR/scheduling skill mix off-thesis, full-ΕΣΗΔΗΣ procurement.
blockers: No verified production court-docket scheduling agent in the EU after focused search; Bürokratt is a substrate, not a court-scheduling deployment.
Pilot tier (€400-700k inclusive of AI Act conformity) requires full ΕΣΗΔΗΣ — incompatible with studio 6-month pilot horizon.
Counsel-side calendar data is structurally unavailable in Greek practice; optimiser is materially weaker than the brief implies.
Judicial-independence framing means the champion has to be a single reform-minded chamber president personally — speculative and non-portable to scale.
Skill mix (OR + scheduling) does not share the legal-NLP / Greek-corpus moat the rest of the Justice portfolio is built around.
ideas.next30days: Do not pursue. Revisit only if a named chamber president personally commissions the work via direct ministry sponsorship and OSDDY exposes a clean scheduling-write API.
